trade.summary: Switzerland exports gold, luxury goods, pharmaceuticals, and watches to the UAE — Dubai is a major global gold trading hub. The UAE exports refined petroleum and re-exported goods to Switzerland. The gold trade dominates bilateral flows.

diplomatic.summary: Switzerland and the UAE maintain excellent diplomatic relations. Switzerland's neutrality and financial expertise make it a natural partner for UAE wealth management and diplomacy. A free trade agreement between the UAE and EFTA (which includes Switzerland) was signed in 2023.

military.summary: Switzerland's strict neutrality precludes meaningful military ties. Limited defense cooperation. Swiss arms export controls restrict weapons sales to conflict-adjacent regions.

financial.summary: Switzerland is a premier wealth management destination for UAE sovereign funds and high-net-worth individuals. Swiss banks (UBS, Credit Suisse successor) manage billions in UAE assets. Swiss Re and Zurich Insurance have major UAE operations. EFTA-UAE FTA signed 2023 deepens financial integration.

energy.summary: Switzerland imports some Gulf petroleum products. The UAE supplies a portion of Switzerland's oil needs indirectly via spot markets. Switzerland has no direct energy pipeline ties to the Gulf.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific collaboration through ETH Zurich partnerships with UAE universities, particularly in sustainability and AI. Switzerland and UAE collaborate on clean energy research.
